name: Harem Pokémon
description:
The Pokémon team turns to you in order to resolve a dispute between them, which of them is the best in the team? In order to get the answer they want, they will go to great lengths to win that position.
Harem: Lycanroc (Midnight), Zoroark, Zeraora, Delphox, Lucario, Meowscarada.
creator: XAQ18K
